overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring the Pacifica district. The character walks from a covered urban walkway with vending machines through a palm-lined colonnade to an open beach boardwalk, revealing ocean views and a distant amusement park with a ferris wheel and roller coaster, before turning back toward the colorful urban buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under building overhang

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the building overhang past vending machines and large advertisement posters

entered.detail: row of colorful vending machines against the wall
large vertical billboard with cartoon character and 'BEST DEAL' text
massive concrete building overhang providing shade
smooth beige building wall with vertical architectural details

segments.scene_description: The character walks under a large concrete building overhang in an urban setting. Vending machines and a large advertisement poster line the left wall while the right side shows the building facade. The area is shaded and sheltered from direct sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered colonnade walkway with palm trees

events.description: exits the covered colonnade into open sunlight approaching the beach boardwalk

agents.ego_description: walking through the columned walkway toward the beach exit, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt standing near the walkway exit looking at the beach

entered.detail: series of white concrete support columns holding up the overhead structure
tall palm trees lining the walkway approach
multi-story modern building with dark glass windows

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a covered colonnade with concrete columns and palm trees visible ahead. The lighting transitions from shaded to direct sunlight as the character approaches the beach exit. A modern glass building rises on the right while other pedestrians walk through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach boardwalk with ocean views

events.description: emerges from covered walkway onto open beach boardwalk with ocean and sand visible
amusement park ferris wheel and roller coaster become visible in the distance across the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the boardwalk observing the beach and ocean views, passing other beachgoers

notable_agents.action: woman in shorts walking along the boardwalk carrying an item
person sitting on concrete bench near the beach sand

entered.detail: small turquoise and orange beach facility building with air conditioning units
sandy beach area with scattered debris and palm fronds
calm blue ocean water with distant breakwater visible
metal railing separating the walkway from the beach drop-off
large white ferris wheel part of the distant amusement park
red and blue roller coaster tracks extending over the water

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a bright, open beach boardwalk area. The turquoise beach building stands prominently while the ocean stretches out to the horizon. As the character walks along the railing, the distant amusement park with its ferris wheel and roller coaster becomes visible across the water. Other pedestrians stroll along the sandy boardwalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront plaza transitioning back to urban district

events.description: character turns and begins walking back toward the urban buildings away from the beach

agents.ego_description: turning away from the beach and walking back toward the Pacifica district buildings, passing a seated man on a bench

notable_agents.action: man sitting alone on a concrete bench facing the ocean

entered.detail: large colorful neon sign reading 'Pacifica' on the building facade
multi-story building with horizontal rainbow-colored stripes
distinctive triangular pyramid-shaped building in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the beachfront, viewing the amusement park structures across the water, then turns back toward the urban area. The iconic 'Pacifica' neon sign becomes visible on the left along with a colorful striped building and a distinctive pyramid-shaped structure. The character walks away from the ocean back into the built environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban corridor into a bright, open-air colonnade. It begins under a large concrete building overhang, moving past vending machines and a large advertisement poster in a shaded, sheltered environment. As the character advances, the scene shifts toward a covered walkway where concrete columns frame a view of palm trees ahead. The lighting then transitions from deep shade to direct sunlight as the camera passes a modern glass building and other pedestrians. The movement finally leads toward the beach exit, where the urban enclosure opens up to the bright exterior.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, open beachfront vista back into the dense, colorful urban architecture of the Pacifica district. It begins as the character emerges onto a sunlit boardwalk, where a turquoise beach building stands against a wide horizon of ocean. As the character walks along the railing past strolling pedestrians, the distant silhouette of an amusement park with its ferris wheel and roller coaster gradually reveals itself across the water. The scene then shifts as the character turns away from the coast, moving back toward the city where the iconic Pacifica neon sign and a colorful striped building come into view. Finally, the camera follows the character past a distinctive pyramid-shaped structure as they leave the ocean behind and re-enter the built environment.
